modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live chat session and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to log into Financial Aid Self Service due to error

full_description_text: 
The user was trying to log into the Financial Aid Self Service but got an authentication error. It said something about a failed procedure and that web access is disabled. They were told to contact the Computing and Information Services Office for help with their account.
short_description: Unable to log into Financial Aid Self Service due to error
description: The user was trying to log into the Financial Aid Self Service but got an authentication error. It said something about a failed procedure and that web access is disabled. They were told to contact the Computing and Information Services Office for help with their account.
